Our Healthcare Services

Exceptional healthcare services delivered by renowned experts using advanced technology. We believe in patient-centric care with affordable options for a superior healthcare experience.

Gynaecology

Expert care for women’s health needs, including obstetrics and gynecology, is provided by experienced specialists in our dedicated department.

know more

General Surgery

Comprehensive surgical care by skilled surgeons for a wide range of medical conditions in our General Surgery department.

know more

ENT

Advanced and specialized care for ear, nose, and throat conditions delivered by highly skilled ENT specialists utilizing state-of-the-art technology in our renowned department.

know more

Pediatrics

Compassionate and expert care for infants, children, and adolescents provided by our dedicated Pediatric department.

know more

Dermatology

Expert care for a wide range of skin, hair, and nail conditions is provided by experienced dermatologists in our specialized department.

know more

Orthopedics

Comprehensive care for musculoskeletal conditions is provided by highly skilled orthopedic specialists in our dedicated department.

know more

Psychology

Expert and compassionate mental health care, including counseling, therapy, and psychiatric services, delivered by experienced psychologists and psychiatrists in our esteemed Psychology department, to support optimal psychological well-being for our patients.

know more

Physiotherapy

Skilled therapists deliver comprehensive and personalized physiotherapy care to promote optimal physical health, mobility, and rehabilitation for our patients.

know more

Urology

Advanced care for urinary tract and male reproductive system conditions is provided by experienced urologists in our specialized department.

know more

Radiology

Advanced diagnostic imaging services provided by experienced radiologists using state-of-the-art technology in our specialized Radiology department for precise and timely diagnoses.

know more

Cardiology

State-of-the-art cardiovascular care delivered by renowned cardiologists, utilizing advanced diagnostics, treatments, and interventions to optimize heart health and enhance patient outcomes in our esteemed Cardiology department.

know more

Ophthalmology

Comprehensive eye care for vision and ocular health, including diagnostics and treatments, is provided by skilled ophthalmologists in our specialized department.

know more

Dr. Ajit Gaba

Managing Director At Aakash Hospital

We aim to deliver Good Quality care to every patient at an affordable cost through Comprehensive Integrated clinical practices, medical Innovation, and lifelong learning. We are dedicated to meet the needs of our patient, staff, and nation.
Join us in our Journey as we shape ?Healthcare? for a better tomorrow.

Testimonials

What Our Patients Are Saying

My rating is based on the home service provider, Sister Sunita Sharma who visited my 88 yr old mother today. Very happy and satisfied with the way she handled my mother. Thank you, sister.

Vinita Sharma

Source: Google Reviews

A good hospital for middle class. It has friendly environment and staff members are very cooperative. Comparative expenses are also low as compared to other hospitals but treatments and facilites are good.

Ajit Jati

Source: Google Reviews

Very affordable and high quality treatment it’s really very nice hospital in South Delhi

Ritesh Kushwaha Kumar

Source: Google Reviews

My experience at Aakash Hospital during the delivery of my first child was amazing. Thanks to the doctors and nurses. Great experience.

Mohit Sharma

Source: Google Reviews

I was suffering from worst cervical pain. And luckily I met Dr. Vallabhi who is an expert and well experienced physio within few sessions I was feeling a lot better.

Yasar Rehman

Source: Google Reviews

The hospital is really good with skilled and polite staff. Really happy with the affordable services and transparent treatment.

Anum Khan

Source: Google Reviews

Hospital ka staff bohot acha hai. Mere bete ko dengue hua tha, bohot jaldi thik ho gaya vo yahan admit karate he. Thankyou aakash hospital.

Reena Singh

Source: Google Reviews

I found myself in Home not in hospital, it was very good experience with every one. Special thanks to Dr. Rk mehra

Sweta Singh

Source: Google Reviews

Why Choose Us

We Truly Care For Our Patients

Expert Medical Team

Our team of experienced physicians, nurses, and support staff are experts in their respective fields.

Advanced Technology

Latest medical equipment and technology to ensure accurate diagnosis, effective treatment, and positive patient outcomes.

Comprehensive Services

From routine check-ups to complex surgeries, we offer a wide range of medical services to cater to the diverse needs of our patients.

Patient-Centric Care

Our approach ensures that each patient is treated with respect, dignity, and compassion, and is actively involved in their healthcare decisions.

Get In Touch

Contact Us With Your Queries

How do I schedule an appointment with the doctor?

For an appointment, you can click any ‘book appointment’ button on our website. Alternatively, call us on our Landline Number 01140501000 (click to dial).

When is the hospital open?

Aakash Hospital is open 24×7 even on Sundays and national holidays.

What insurance plans does Aakash Hospital accept?

We accept all insurance claims.

Do you provide emergency services?

Our emergency services are open 24×7. You may call on any of the two numbers 011 40501000 or +91-9818166605.


Yes, I agree with the privacy policy.

Call Us 011 40501000
